title: PharmEasy is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: PharmEasy is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
PharmEasy invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Full Stack Developer at our Amritsar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About PharmEasy:
PharmEasy is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PharmEasy!
